---
title: "NFL-Graphing-J"
author: "Justin C. Eldridge"
date: "2024-12-03"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Graphing

## Matthews Corellation Coefficient

```{r}

#Convert some of the list objects into data frames for plotting
team_names <- as.data.frame(model_info$nfl_team)

team_names <- team_names %>%
  rename(nfl_team = `model_info$nfl_team`)

mcc_vals <- as.data.frame(model_info$m_corr)

mcc_vals_long <- mcc_vals %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),        # Select all columns
    names_to = "variable",      # Create a column for the original column names
    values_to = "mcc_value"     # Create a column for the values
  )

plot_df <- data.frame(Team = team_names$nfl_team, MCC = mcc_vals_long$mcc_value)

#Use the correlations in the model info list to plot correllation by team
corr_plot <- plot_df %>%
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(x=Team, y=MCC))+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45))

corr_plot

```
